metadata.description: A woman in her 20s or early 30s presents with olive skin, displaying minor texture variations and small, scattered blemishes. Her face is oval with a gently rounded jawline. Her dark brown hair is pulled back into a high, messy ponytail, revealing a natural hairline and some wispy strands around her face. Her striking amber-brown eyes are almond-shaped and widely set, framed by medium-thick, arched eyebrows. Her nose is straight with a rounded tip, and her lips are medium-full with a soft, natural curve. Small, scattered freckles are visible across her cheeks and forehead. Her features suggest a mixed heritage. She holds a subtle, pleasant smile, with her head angled slightly to the right.
metadata.anchor: Woman with amber-brown eyes and messy ponytail.
